title: woodsia mollis
intro: Woodsia mollis, also known as the flexible fern or lady fern, is a species of fern native to North America. The medicinal properties of Woodsia mollis include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of using Woodsia mollis include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe coughs, and alleviate symptoms of allergies. The herbal preparations of Woodsia mollis typically involve drying the leaves and roots, then using them to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
